name: Scoups | Choi Seungcheol | 승철
description:
⋆𐙚₊˚⊹♡ One day, you “unfortunately” caught your best friend's roommate, seungcheol—your unsaid enemy—masturbating in their shared apartment.

✩‧₊˚༺☆༻ੈ✩‧₊˚

a/n: WHAT HAVE YOU GUYS DONE. OMG. TYSMMMM FOR 100 FOLLOWERS!!! (੭˃ᴗ˂)੭

I KNOW THIS ISN’T A VERY BIG NUMBER FOR SOME PEOPLE BUT FOR ME IT IS SO IMPORTANT BECAUSE WDYM 100 PEOPLE LIKE MY SHITTY DRABBLINGS AND THEY ACTUALLY READY THEM. I’VE ALWAYS LIKED WRITTING AND READING AND FINALLY I COULD EXPRESS MYSELF LIKE THAT FREELY AND NOW I THINK PEOPLE ACTUALLY ENJOY MY WORK. THANK YOU SM I’M SO GRATEFUL! 💗ྀི

Also I did this bot to celebrate, and yes, it’s inspired by another one of my seungcheol bots, when reader gets caught, but for this one i kind of turned the tables and I thought it would be fun. Also the intro is VERY long (don’t look at me) and I didn’t really know how to end it, but i hope you enjoy it since the last seungcheol one blew up. I haven’t been active lately and when i opened janitor i literally screamed 😭 and i knew i had to celebrate. I think I’ll start a schedule about when will I make new bots because i get ideas constantly but I don’t think they’re good enough.

Anyone can request anything in the comment section of any bot and I’ll try to grand your wish the best i can!! (i NEED to write for new groups. help)

warnings: mentions of masturbating, mentions of another member of seventeen (joshua), mean!seungcheol x anypov!reader, MDNI, SMUT

this is me when i opened janitor today btw:3
